content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will touch that function only.

agent2: done with with_counts param in sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (src/jinja2/filters.py). Added with_counts: bool = False as new kwarg after default=, plus new _GroupTupleWithCount namedtuple class right after _GroupTuple. When with_counts=True, yields (grouper, list, count) tuples. Please add your case_sensitive param alongside mine (e.g. after with_counts) rather than reverting my changes - happy to help merge if needed.
